description_long: This object is an extremely minimalistic humanoid robot, represented by a single, perfectly straight, thin vertical rod. There are no discernible limbs, head, torso, or any anatomical features typically associated with humanoid robots. The rod appears uniform in thickness and color throughout its length, with no visible joints, sensors, or decorative elements. Its surface is smooth and likely metallic, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The robot's design is highly abstract, lacking any functional or interactive components. Its simplicity suggests it is more of a conceptual or symbolic representation of a humanoid robot rather than a functional machine.
description: A highly abstract humanoid robot, depicted as a single thin vertical rod with a smooth, metallic surface and no visible features or components.
description_view_0: A straight, thin vertical rod is seen from the front, with no visible features or details.
description_view_1: The rod appears as a thin diagonal line, emphasizing its slenderness and lack of depth.
description_view_2: The rod is again seen vertically, identical to the front view, with no additional features.
description_view_3: The rod is shown as a thin diagonal line, mirroring view 1, with no visible details.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a perfectly upright, neutral pose with no visible limbs, head, or torso; it is represented solely by a straight vertical rod.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, with no coverings or decorative elements; only a bare metallic rod is visible.
attribute_facial_features: No facial features are present; the rod lacks eyes, mouth, nose, or any expressive elements.
attribute_limb_articulation: No limbs or joints are visible; the object is a single rigid rod with no articulation.
